t_ch: 我叫丹恒。
t_en: My name is Dan Heng.

t_ch: 遵命，飞龙忍者•AOI•丹恒阁下。
t_en: Understood, Ninja Hiryū Aoi Dan Heng.

t_ch: 呃…她好认真啊，这种类型叫什么来着？中二病？
t_en: Um... She's taking this really seriously. Is this what people call chuunibyou?

t_ch: 怕不是谜语人。
t_en: Maybe she's a Riddler.

t_ch: 多少沾点纯美骑士。
t_en: I see hints of the Knights of Beauty.

t_ch: 宝了个贝的，巡海游侠？
t_en: Fudge me, a Galaxy Ranger?

t_ch: 银河世界千奇百怪，也许真存在一颗「忍法星球」也说不定。
t_en: Strange things happen across the cosmos. Maybe a Ninjutsu Planet does exist.

t_ch: 她就是你在梦里看见的忍者？
t_en: Is she the ninja you saw in your dream?

t_ch: 正是。在下与球棒•忍者是出生入死的忍道挚友，曾在邪祟幻境中遭遇围困，同休共戚。
t_en: Indeed. Baseball Bat Ninja and I are comrades who will risk life and limb for one another. We were besieged in the fiendling fantasia and survived together.

t_ch: 偷听别人说话可不是什么正当之举。
t_en: It's not nice to eavesdrop on conversations.

t_ch: 忍者的超•听力连质子入灭的声响也可捕捉，各位在我面前高声议论，不算偷听。
t_en: A ninja's super hearing can capture even the death of a proton. You spoke loudly before me. I wasn't eavesdropping.

t_ch: 你自称是我们的同伴，理应表明身份来意。
t_en: You claim to be our companion, so it's only reasonable to ask that you state your identity and purpose.

t_ch: 当然，在下正是为此而来。但在此之前——
t_en: Of course. That is exactly why I'm here. But before that—

t_ch: 眼下仍有公义需要伸张，乱破当先全力相助。
t_en: There is still justice to be upheld. I must prioritize assisting that cause.

t_ch: 你们还在，太好了——
t_en: You're still here. Thank goodness!

t_ch: 可恶的学生会，居然区别对待……
t_en: Stupid student council. This is discrimination.

t_ch: 伎乐忍徒，为何烦扰？
t_en: Ninja Initiate Gigaku, what ails you?

t_ch: 别再用戏里的名字称呼我了，叫人家的艺名吧——芭蕉花酱！
t_en: Stop calling me by the name of my character. Use my stage name — Nanabloom-chan!

t_ch: 听起来又是群友。
t_en: Another one from the group chat?

t_ch: 是哒，人家在群里的昵称是「芭蕉花酱（努力版）」！
t_en: Correct! My nickname in the group chat is Nanabloom-chan (Hardworking Edition)!

t_ch: 芭蕉花？
t_en: Nanabloom?

t_ch: 就是香蕉开的花！很漂亮哦！
t_en: Referring to the flowers that bloom on banana trees. They're really pretty!

t_ch: 酱？
t_en: Why chan?

t_ch: 这是常盘国的同学给我起的，是不是很可爱！
t_en: A classmate from Tokiwa calls me that. Isn't it cute?

t_ch: 仔细看过才发现，这届新生的素质还真不一般！请务必要参加我们演艺社的活动——「折纸大学超级闪耀明星计划•写真大挑战」！
t_en: You know, I just realized how high caliber our new students are this year. Please, you absolutely must take part in the Performing Arts Club's "Paperfold University Superstar Project Photography Challenge"!

t_ch: 名字好长！
t_en: That's a really long name!

t_ch: 这项挑战需要各位扮演明星模特，选出一位摄影师来拍摄符合要求的照片，我们会印成写真集送给大家。
t_en: This challenge requires you to take on the role of celebrity models. You'll choose a photographer who will take a photo that meets our requirements. We'll then print it into a photobook and send it to you.

t_ch: 听起来好棒，我们一起来拍吧！
t_en: That sounds great. Let's take some photos together!

t_ch: 既然是伎乐忍徒准备的试炼，在下也没有理由推辞。
t_en: If it's a trial prepared by Ninja Initiate Gigaku, I see no reason to refuse.

t_ch: 好耶！那你们选出一位摄影师吧，比起模特，这项挑战更考验摄影师的技巧！
t_en: Great! Now choose a photographer among yourselves. This challenge will put the photographer's skills to the test more than the model's!

t_ch: 我来！
t_en: I'll do it!

t_ch: 摄影师三月，上！
t_en: Photographer March 7th, you're up!

t_ch: 那个…要不还是{NICKNAME}来？求求了，我比较想要自己的写真嘛。
t_en: What? Um... Can't you do it, {NICKNAME}? Please? I really want my own photoshoot! I'm begging you.

t_ch: 靠谱的丹恒，上！
t_en: The ever-reliable Dan Heng, you're up!

t_ch: 我没给别人拍过照片，还是你来吧。
t_en: I've never taken photos of other people before. It might be better if you do it.

t_ch: 摄影忍者乱破，上！
t_en: Photographer Ninja Rappa, you're up!

t_ch: 抱歉，在下并不擅长使用这种忍具，还是交给阁下吧。
t_en: My apologies. I am unfamiliar with this particular ninja tool. It's best I leave it to you.

t_ch: 那摄影就交给你了，加油！至于道具…就用这些睡蕉小猴玩偶吧。
t_en: Then you're in charge of photography. Good luck! As for our prop... Let's use this Slumbernana Monkey toy.

t_ch: 来吧同学，一定要让<color=#dbc291ff>所有模特与睡蕉小猴</color>都同时入镜哦！
t_en: Alright, make sure you get <color=#dbc291ff>all the models and the Slumbernana Monkey</color> in the shot.

t_ch: 为小伙伴们拍下照片吧！
t_en: Take photos of your friends!

t_ch: 丹恒
t_en: Dan Heng

t_ch: 乱破
t_en: Rappa

t_ch: 三月七
t_en: March 7th

t_ch: 所有小猴跳起的瞬间
t_en: The moment all little monkeys jump

t_ch: 哇，太完美了！我要把这些场照挂到摊位上！
t_en: Wow, perfect! I'm going to display these photos at the booth.

t_ch: 球棒•忍者，阁下的留影•忍法甚是精妙啊。
t_en: Baseball Bat Ninja, your Photo Ninjutsu is exquisite!

t_ch: 唉，真羡慕各位这么上相，我也好想成为热砂海选的盛会之星呀……
t_en: I envy how photogenic you all are. I want to be one of the stars featured in the Scorchsand Audition too...

t_ch: 算了算了，狂欢的日子不提这种伤心事。请拿好写真集，祝你们玩的愉快！
t_en: Forget it. Let's not talk about such depressing topics in the middle of festivities. Here's your photobook. Have fun!

t_ch: 现在不会再有人打扰了，说吧。你这一路都在跟踪我们，为什么？
t_en: No one will bother us anymore. Tell me. Why have you been following us all this time?

t_ch: 很敏锐，看来阁下也拥有忍者的超•听力。但同行只是一场巧合，在下前来，只为在校园中布设缭乱•忍符，破除邪忍阵法。
t_en: Very astute. It appears you have ninja super hearing too. However, following you was mere coincidence. My purpose for coming here is to set up Dazzling Ninja Seals across the campus in order to dispel the Evil Ninja's matrix.

t_ch: 忍符…哦，就是纪检部的学生提到的「乱涂乱画」吧。
t_en: Seals? Oh, the grafitti the student from the Disciplinary Committee was talking about.

t_ch: 因果何其奥妙，在下竟与诸位无名•忍者重逢。飞龙•忍者不认得在下，但一定记得我的同僚——身披银甲，豪迈潇洒，善使枪弹忍法，口中常念甘言美语的忍侠……
t_en: Cause and effect is a wondrous thing. It allowed me to reunite with you, the Nameless Ninjas. Ninja Hiryū may not recognize me, but he must remember my colleague: A Ninja Hero clad in silver armor. He has a bold, easy confidence, is proficient in the use of bullet ninjutsu, and frequently spouts sweet and melodious words...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「银枪•修罗」</color>殿下。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Silvergun Shura</color>!

t_ch: 银什么？
t_en: Silver who now?

t_ch: 什么罗？
t_en: Shura huh?

t_ch: 我好像知道是谁了…
t_en: I think I know who that is...

t_ch: …波提欧，是他么？
t_en: ...Is it Boothill?

t_ch: 正是。
t_en: Precisely.

t_ch: 所以，你也是「巡海游侠」的一员？
t_en: Does that mean you're also a Galaxy Ranger?

t_ch: 当然，在下生怕引起误会，故而一直在强调「忍侠」名号。
t_en: Of course. I didn't want to cause a misunderstanding, so I emphasized the title Ninja Hero.

t_ch: 这俩词是一个意思？
t_en: They both mean the same thing?

t_ch: 这样是谁入住了酒店就有了答案。可巡海游侠为何要重访梦境？
t_en: So we now know who checked into the hotel. But why are the Galaxy Rangers revisiting the Dreamscape?

t_ch: 飞龙•忍者，诸位都是习得「开拓」真传的上忍，自然知道在银河忍界中，像我等这般伟力非凡的忍者不在少数，其中亦有邪忍。
t_en: Ninja Hiryū. You and your companions are all elite ninjas who follow the true teachings of Trailblaze. You should know in the Cosmic Ninja Realm, there are many extraordinary individuals like me, but also evil ninjas.

t_ch: 邪忍一日不灭，需要我等忍侠出手的险情便日出不穷。在下造访毗乃昆尼，正是为了狩猎一匹恶徒。
t_en: So long as the Evil Ninja still lives, danger that requires the presence of us Ninja Heroes will never cease. The reason I visit Pinecany is to hunt down one such scoundrel.

t_ch: 他带领邪祟为害四方，是忍之都的仇寇，亦是在下的死敌——「御猿•邪忍」是也！
t_en: He wreaks havoc across the universe with his fiendlings in tow. He is the enemy of the Ninja Capital and my archenemy — Evil Ninja Osaru.

t_ch: …你知道她在说什么吗？
t_en: ...Do you know what she's talking about?

t_ch: 不知道。
t_en: I don't know.

t_ch: 忍者游戏玩的。
t_en: She's playing ninja games.

t_ch: 在下听得很清楚。
t_en: I can hear you.

t_ch: 此乃忍法帖中记载的忍界•事记。
t_en: A historical account of the ninja realm logged in the Ninja Scrolls.

t_ch: 当我没问。
t_en: Forget I asked.

t_ch: 这下麻烦了…如果她的游侠身份属实，就不能把这些言谈当成说笑，也许匹诺康尼真的发生了什么。
t_en: This is troubling. If she really is a Ranger, we have to take her story seriously. Perhaps something has happened in Penacony.

t_ch: 要出手吗？
t_en: Should we take action?

t_ch: 要联系家族吗？
t_en: Should we contact The Family?

t_ch: 要逃吗？
t_en: Should we run?

t_ch: 形势还不明朗，先别轻举妄动，毕竟我们现在的身份只是「旁听生」。
t_en: The situation isn't clear. We shouldn't act rashly. After all, we're currently here as guest students.

t_ch: 如果能联系上波提欧就好了，他现在到底在哪呢……
t_en: It would help if we could get in touch with Boothill. I wonder where he is...

t_ch: 大家很上镜呢，但没拍到小猴可不行，再来一次吧。
t_en: Everyone looks so photogenic, but Slumbernana Monkey is missing from the shot. Try again.

t_ch: 球棒•忍者，阁下的留影•忍法甚是精妙啊。
t_en: Baseball Bat Ninja, your Photo Ninjutsu is exquisite!

t_ch: 唉，真羡慕各位这么上相，我也好想成为热砂海选的盛会之星呀……
t_en: I envy how photogenic you all are. I want to be one of the stars featured in the Scorchsand Audition too...

t_ch: 算了算了，狂欢的日子不提这种伤心事。请拿好写真集，祝你们玩的愉快！
t_en: Forget it. Let's not talk about such depressing topics in the middle of festivities. Here's your photobook. Have fun!

t_ch: 是啊，在我醒来时，我的大脑在说：「仇恨是一切弱者的弱点」。
t_en: Sure enough, when I came to, my mind was whisperin': Hatred is the frailty of the weak.

t_ch: 那时我才意识到，原来自己还算有一个脑子是「活着」的。
t_en: That's when it hit me. I've got a mind that's still "alive."

t_ch: 但要让我说啊……
t_en: But if you ask me...

t_ch: 去他宝贝的，脑子可管不着我，不然我怎么到得了这儿？
t_en: My muddle-fudgin' brain ain't the boss of me! Or how'd I end up here?

t_ch: 嗯？
t_en: Hm?

t_ch: 他宝贝的……
t_en: Forkin' hell...

t_ch: 客人，恕我冒昧问一句，这已经是您点的第七杯了，可每一杯您又只喝一口…是有什么地方不合口味吗？
t_en: Pardon me for asking, but this is your seventh drink and you've only had a sip from each... Is there something the matter with them?

t_ch: 哦，没有的事，这些小甜水味道不错。点这么多只是一种习惯。
t_en: Oh, it ain't like that. These little sweet drinks taste pretty good. Ordering a bunch is just a habit of mine.

t_ch: 放心姐们，你很快就知道为什么了。我出去干点活，这些先帮我留着。走了啊。
t_en: No need to worry, lady, you'll know soon enough. I'm headin' out to take care of some business. Keep these safe for me.

t_ch: 说是给乱破搭把手，但这地方哪有什么怪动静？
t_en: I get that I'm supposed to be helping Rappa, but I don't see anything strange going on here.

t_ch: 我再说最后一遍，你到底有没有审美？
t_en: I'll ask you one last time. Do you have any taste at all?

t_ch: 这地方空着，半点用处都没有。但摆上「睡蕉」塑像，建成广场，它就能摇身一变成为流梦礁的象征。咱们就能走在家族前边了。
t_en: This place is useless sitting here empty. But if we put a Slumbernana statue here and build a plaza, it'll instantly become a landmark of Dreamflux Reef. We'll be able to get ahead of The Family again.

t_ch: 这事你说了不算，自说自话把这块地据为己有…恐怕没人会接受吧？
t_en: It doesn't matter what you say. You can't just stake your claim on this place. No one's going to accept that.

t_ch: 那谁说了算？米凯都没说什么…还要磨磨蹭蹭的？
t_en: Then who should we listen to? Micah hasn't said anything! There's no reason to delay.

t_ch: 今天它非得放在这儿不——
t_en: I'm going to put this here today or—

t_ch: 不是，你谁啊？
t_en: Huh? Who are you?

t_ch: 得了吧，哥们，我还没问你呢。
t_en: Come off it, pardner. I ain't even said anything yet.

t_ch: 别管你们有什么恩怨，先让条道出来？
t_en: I don't care what beef y'all got, just make way, will ya?

t_ch: 怎么，这男的是你们找来出头的？
t_en: So what? You hired this guy to be your thug?

t_ch: 不，我也不认识这位先生，但无论有没有人出头，我们的态度都不会变。
t_en: No, I don't know this man either. But thug or no, our position isn't going to change.

t_ch: 那就别怪我不客气了。
t_en: Then I'm done playing nice.

t_ch: 搞什么，听不懂人话？*他宝贝的*，非要我鸣枪才好使？
t_en: Forkin' hell, you hard of hearing or something? Do I have to let my gun do the talking?

t_ch: 行啊，那就准备听个响？
t_en: Alright then! Hope you're ready to get shot.

t_ch: 不用了，先生，我替二位向你道歉。
t_en: There's no need for that, sir. Allow me to apologize on their behalf.

t_ch: 请把枪收起来吧，都是「死」过一次的人，恐怕受不了这种刺激。
t_en: Please, put your gun away. I'm afraid that's too much excitement for those of us who've already "died" once.

t_ch: …你又是谁？这儿到底演什么戏呢？
t_en: ...Who are you, now? What kinda show they runnin' here?

t_ch: 得了，这世上的复杂事多了去，等枪响一声都会变简单。
t_en: Forget it. The world's complicated enough as it is, but my bullets will make things real simple.

t_ch: 到那时候再琢磨也不迟，*他香蕉的*，今天就给你们上上这一课……
t_en: Act first, think later. You bet your forkin' bananas I'm teaching all of you a lesson today—

t_ch: 等会儿，刚才那什么玩意儿？
t_en: Wait a sec. The fudge was that?

t_ch: 他香蕉的？我他香蕉的怎么开始他香蕉的了？
t_en: Bet your bananas? When the bananas did I start saying fudgin' bananas?

t_ch: 蕉？我蕉你宝贝？这香蕉什么？
t_en: Bananas? Son of a banana? What the banana fudgin' sundae?

t_ch: 米凯，你不是一向不管这些事吗？
t_en: Micah, I thought you don't get involved in these matters.

t_ch: 只是放些大家都喜欢的装饰而已，没冒犯任何人。
t_en: I'm just putting up a decoration everyone likes. I'm not hurting anybody.

t_ch: 首先，我很难认为大家都喜欢那些猴子。
t_en: First, I find it hard to believe that everyone likes those monkeys.

t_ch: 其次，我只是恰巧路过，看到朋友来和他打个招呼。
t_en: Second, I just happened to be passing by. I saw a friend and came to say hello.

t_ch: 朋友？
t_en: Friend?

t_ch: 是啊，实话说，我记不起你的名字了，这些年我见过的人太多。
t_en: That's right. Though truth be told, I don't remember your name anymore. I've met too many people over the last few years.

t_ch: 但那双眼睛我还记得——「多好啊，在这里每一个人都能做自己的梦。」刚刚来到这里时，你是这么说的，眼里亮着难得一见的神采。
t_en: But I still remember those eyes — "This is great! Everyone can make their own dreams here." — That's what you said when you first arrived. Your eyes gleamed with spirit.

t_ch: 别把初心忘了。
t_en: Don't forget the aspirations you once had.

t_ch: 大庭广众的，别讲这些，你也该改改好为人师的毛病了。
t_en: Do you have to say these things out in the open? You need to fix your bad habit of lecturing people.

t_ch: 一种事物受到追捧自然有它的原因，你迟早会明白。
t_en: There's a reason why things become popular. You'll understand some day.

t_ch: 但今天…给你个面子也无妨，等着瞧吧——我们走。
t_en: But fine, I'll back off for today. I'll be back. Let's go.

t_ch: 等等…他香蕉的，先不管了，大不了少说两句。
t_en: Hold on! Banana my sundae... Forget it, guess I could afford to say less.

t_ch: 呦呵——上哪儿去？
t_en: Hey — where you going?

t_ch: 先由着他们去吧，至少对您本人，他们没有任何敌意。
t_en: Let them be. At the very least, they harbor no ill will towards you.

t_ch: 更何况我们也没胆量那么做，对吧，游侠先生？
t_en: And they certainly don't have the courage to do anything, anyway. Right, Mr. Ranger?

t_ch: 哈，倒是来了个识相的？
t_en: Hah. Finally, someone sensible.

t_ch: 我知道你想问什么，巡海游侠的第一枪响亮非凡，流梦礁还没闭塞到听不见外边的声音。
t_en: I know what you want to ask. A Galaxy Ranger's gunshot rings loud and clear. And Dreamflux Reef isn't so isolated that we don't hear what's going on outside our walls.

t_ch: 那这一枪就算没白开。
t_en: Good to know I didn't waste my shot.

t_ch: 倒是我开眼了，你们这的气氛怪稀奇啊，还有给猴子立雕像的。
t_en: But I gotta say, I've seen it all now. The atmosphere here is real strange. I mean, statues of monkeys?

t_ch: 只是些年轻人的风尚而已，对我来说…一位巡海游侠来到流梦礁才更稀奇。
t_en: It's just a fad among youngsters. If you ask me, it's even stranger that a Galaxy Ranger is in Dreamflux Reef.

t_ch: 逐恶而来，还是旧恨未消？
t_en: Are you here chasing evil or settling a grudge?

t_ch: 用不着这么弯弯绕绕，瞧我这样还不明白？他香蕉的，一嘴巴都是香蕉。
t_en: You don't gotta beat around the bush. Can't you just tell by lookin' at me? Banana sundae, everything's bananas.

t_ch: 原本不过是给别人搭把手，这下倒好，我成最大的怪动静了！你香蕉的，告诉我，那猴子是怎么回事？
t_en: I came here to help someone and now I'm the biggest ruckus around here. Son of a banana, tell me what's going on with that monkey!

t_ch: 虽然还没过去多久，但那些人来得也和你一样突然……
t_en: It wasn't that long ago, but they arrived just as suddenly as you did...

t_ch: 先等会儿，我走神了？哪些人？
t_en: Huh? Did I miss something? Who's they?

t_ch: 他们自称「助蕉」，看着像美梦剧团，但要多奇怪有多奇怪。来这里，只是为了宣扬一种名为「睡蕉小猴」的……
t_en: They call themselves Assistananas. They look like the Sweet Dreams Troupe, except much stranger. They came here to advertise something called the Slumbernana Monkey...

t_ch: 嗯…形象也好，文化也罢，就像每一种曾经流行过的事物。
t_en: Hm... Maybe it's the appearance or the cultural significance. Just like every other thing that was once trendy.

t_ch: 我对睡蕉小猴没什么意见，它确实讨年轻人喜欢。真要说麻烦，反倒是它的狂热拥趸。刚才那些人你也见到了，很快就迷上了小猴，还自发组织了……
t_en: I don't have an opinion on Slumbernana Monkey. The young people love it. The real problem is the level of fanaticism it creates. You saw the group from before. They grew obsessed with the monkey and formed their own society.

t_ch: 「睡蕉社」？应该是这个名字吧，打着社团的旗号，在流梦礁四处搞宣传活动，而且不怎么友好。
t_en: I think it's called the Slumbernana Association. They run publicity campaigns all across Dreamflux Reef under its banner, and they're not very friendly.

t_ch: 哦，就刚才那几个小香蕉自称的？没人管管？
t_en: Oh, those self-proclaimed banana maniacs just now? And no one's tried to stop them?

t_ch: 没有不会落幕的风潮，在流梦礁，这也不算什么前所未见的事，所以犯不着干涉，更何况……
t_en: Fads come and go. It's not all that unusual even in Dreamflux Reef, so I didn't see a reason to intervene. Besides...

t_ch: 在很长一段时间里，这里都是匹诺康尼仅有一处的自由之地，有些事是不该被改变的。
t_en: For a very long time, this was the only place in Penacony that had some freedom. Some things just shouldn't be changed.

t_ch: 也行。你不管自有人管。睡蕉社是吧，谢了，哥们。
t_en: Fine by me. If you won't deal with it, somebody else will. The Slumbernana Association, huh. Appreciate the tip, pardner.

t_ch: 请留步，游侠先生。我一开始的疑问，你还只字未提。
t_en: One moment, Mr. Ranger. You haven't answered my question from earlier.

t_ch: 逐恶而来，还是旧恨未消？
t_en: Are you here chasing evil or settling a grudge?

t_ch: 哼，我长得就那么像杀人狂？答案是二者皆有，更多的就别问了。
t_en: Huh, do I look like some kind of madman to you? The answer is both. Any more than that is none of your business.

t_ch: 还不放心？这样吧哥们，你去隔壁翠丝那家店，有份七杯的账单。付过以后，就当你买下了我在这的安分。
t_en: You still worried 'bout somethin'? Tell you what, buddy, go to Jessie's shop next door. There's a tab for seven drinks. Settle that, and consider my behavior here bought and paid for.

t_ch: 七杯？
t_en: Seven drinks?

t_ch: 就算不怎么样，但总归是麦芽汁，但凡请我喝的人，我从不对他们食言。
t_en: It may not be much, but it's still malt juice. I never break a promise to those who treat me.

t_ch: 这话绝对可信，当初面对这类人时，我宁可挨了几枪，也没背信弃义。
t_en: You can bet on that. The first time I met someone like that, I let myself get shot rather than betray them.

t_ch: 抱歉抱歉，入场暂停了，有社员在里面打翻了个大家伙，还在收拾。
t_en: I'm very sorry. We're temporarily closed. A member knocked something big over and we're still cleaning it up.

t_ch: 很快就好了，先准备好社员证吧，看起来倒也不用排队。
t_en: It won't take long. You should get your membership card first. It doesn't look like there's a queue right now.

t_ch: 睡蕉社…不等那忍者姐们了，我自个儿去探探路。
t_en: The Slumbernana Association... I ain't waiting for that ninja gal. I'll find my own way.

t_ch: 潮流不过是种名目，没有不会落幕的风潮。但如果你别有所求…我也不会多过问。
t_en: A fad is just a fad. It always comes to an end. But if you're here for something else, then I won't pry further.

t_ch: 这可没法给你行方便啊。
t_en: You're not making things easy here.

t_ch: 口口声声说自己是睡蕉小猴的粉丝，但又一问三不知。
t_en: You say you're a Slumbernana Monkey fan, but you can't even answer any of my questions.

t_ch: 等等，我只是一下子想不起来了。对了对了，第二十条…第二十条是……
t_en: Wait, wait, it just slipped my mind for a moment. I think I got it. Number <unbreak>20</unbreak> is... is...

t_ch: 「希望大家都能认清这个世界，一个正在长成的完美圆弧。」
t_en: "May all see the world for what it is: An arc waxing into perfection."

t_ch: 这都哪跟哪啊，你还是先回去吧，这几天的活动特殊得很，随便跟风是进不去的。
t_en: What nonsense are you spouting? You'd best go home for now. The events we're holding over the next few days aren't like any other! Jumping on the bandwagon isn't going to nab you an entrance ticket.

t_ch: 先等等，这位朋友，是来参加睡蕉社活动的？
t_en: Hold it right there. Here for the Slumbernana Association event, sir?

t_ch: 带社员证了吗？编号多少？
t_en: Got your membership card with you? I'll need your member ID.

t_ch: 什么香蕉玩意儿？
t_en: What the banana sundae are you talking about?

t_ch: 又一个跟风的…回去吧，这里只欢迎真正热爱睡蕉小猴的朋友。
t_en: Ugh, another bandwagoner. Exit's over there, sir. We don't welcome anyone but true fans of Slumbernana Monkey here.

t_ch: 哥们，别让我再重复一遍，我可是爱死香蕉了。小心点，别把事情搞太复杂——
t_en: Listen, buddy, don't make me repeat myself. I love me some bananas. You don't wanna make things more complicated than they need to be—

t_ch: 别、别掏枪啊，蕉子动口不动手！想参加活动是吧，可以是可以……
t_en: P—Put the gun down, sir! We can talk this out without going bananas. I gather you're keen on checking out the event? Well, that's fine and all...

t_ch: 但我也不能就这么放你进去，真感兴趣，就先从了解睡蕉小猴开始吧。
t_en: But I can't just let you in. If you're really interested, why not start off by learning more about Slumbernana Monkey?

t_ch: 像刚才那姐们一样？进这道门还要对暗号？
t_en: Like that gal from just now? Gotta give a passphrase just to get through this door?

t_ch: 不是暗号，是入社考核。毕竟里面有很重要的活动，不少人都想见识见识。
t_en: No, that wasn't a passphrase but an entrance test to become a member of the Society. We're hosting an incredibly important event inside, after all. Everybody wants to be a part of it.

t_ch: 还挺像回事儿，来，让哥们也试试？
t_en: Sounds impressive. Sign me up, pardner.

t_ch: 呃，没你想得那么简单，如果只是粗浅地了解过睡蕉小猴，完全不可能通过的。
t_en: Uh, it's a lot harder than it sounds. You won't be able to pass the test unless you're an expert on Slumbernana Monkey.

t_ch: 问就完了，先试试，总比打进去方便。
t_en: I might as well give it a shot. Gotta be easier than breakin' my way in.

t_ch: 嗯…好吧，睡蕉社不会拒绝任何想成为朋友的人。那就让我来考考你吧。这几道题目，你想先回答哪个？
t_en: ...Fine. The Slumbernana Association is always happy to make more friends. Are you ready for the challenge? Now, which of these questions would you like to start with?

t_ch: 睡蕉社的成员级别
t_en: Slumbernana Association's membership hierarchy.

t_ch: 睡蕉小猴的名言
t_en: Slumbernana Monkey's famous quotes.

t_ch: 睡蕉小猴二创禁令
t_en: Ban on derivative works inspired by Slumbernana Monkey.

t_ch: 他香蕉的，这都什么？
t_en: Banana my sundae! What kind of questions are these?

t_ch: 看来您完全是一无所知嘛，这已经是很简单的题目了。
t_en: Looks like you're completely clueless about Slumbernana. These are pretty much no-brainers, you know.

t_ch: 抱歉啦…至少现在，我还不能放你进去。
t_en: Sorry, but I can't let you in for now.

t_ch: 哥们，你运气不错。这要是我自己的事儿，肯定就换个法子开道了。可惜这是给别人搭把手，闹不得太大动静。
t_en: Pardner, you're in luck. If this were my own business, I'd be makin' my way through by other means. But since I'm just lending a hand, I can't go raisin' too much ruckus.

t_ch: 行啊，那就按规矩来，几个问题能难到哪儿去？
t_en: Okay, we'll do things your way. How hard can a few questions be anyway?

t_ch: 「We run, we stride——」
t_en: "We run, we stride..."

t_ch: 知更鸟姐姐，是这样唱吗？
t_en: Miss Robin, am I singing it right?

t_ch: 嗯，很棒哦。
t_en: Mm-hmm. You're doing wonderfully.

t_ch: 对了，可以让我检查一下你的身体吗？
t_en: That reminds me. Shall I give you a checkup?

t_ch: 虽然你学得很快，但这毕竟是种难度很高的唱法，得注意保护自己的嗓子才行呀。
t_en: You learn fast, but this is an advanced singing technique, after all. It won't do if you don't take good care of your throat.

t_ch: 怎么了，知更鸟姐姐？
t_en: Is something the matter, Miss Robin?

t_ch: 没事，是我多虑了，你很健康哦。
t_en: Nothing's wrong. I was just worrying too much. Everything is looking good.

t_ch: 真没想到，竟然能在这种地方见到大明星。
t_en: I can't believe I just ran into a superstar, and in a place like this too.

t_ch: 别害怕，这位伯伯是好人，你先去其他地方玩吧。
t_en: It's okay. This big brother here is a good man. Why don't you go and have fun somewhere else for now?

t_ch: 什么「波波」？
t_en: "Big bother"?

t_ch: 也对，或许还是让她称呼「先生」更合适？
t_en: Um... Maybe I should've just kept it at "Mister." Would that have been better?

t_ch: 波提欧先生，看来您也在那件事后暂时停下了脚步啊，在匹诺康尼玩得还愉快吗？
t_en: In any case, Mr. Boothill, it seems you've put your travels on hold after that incident too. Are you enjoying your time in Penacony?

t_ch: 愉快？蕉！破事儿一个接一个。
t_en: Enjoying? Hah, more like going bananas! Bananas, I just can't catch a break.

t_ch: 波提欧先生这是…咦，等等？
t_en: Mr. Boothill, you... Huh? Hang on.

t_ch: 抱歉，请先别动……
t_en: Sorry, please keep still for a moment...

t_ch: 他宝贝的，你干什么？
t_en: What in the forkin' hell are you doing?

t_ch: 喵！喵喵？哈——可算回来了。
t_en: Fork. Fudge? Fudge! Holy shirtballs, I'm back to normal!

t_ch: 果然，波提欧先生身上也存在着类似的杂音。
t_en: I knew it. There's a noise around Mr. Boothill too.

t_ch: 类似？听起来不是第一次了，你知道这宝贝香蕉是怎么回事？
t_en: "Too"? Sounds like you've encountered this before. So, what in tarnation is going on with all this "bananas" business?

t_ch: 抱歉，我还没完全弄清楚。
t_en: I wish I could tell you, but I still haven't figured out what it is.

t_ch: 最近，我常来这里教孩子们唱歌。放弃美梦不是件容易的事，我希望音乐能给他们一些帮助。
t_en: I've been visiting this place a lot lately to teach the children how to sing. Giving up one's sweet dreams takes resolve, so it's my wish that music can bring them some solace.

t_ch: 但渐渐地，我发现流梦礁变得有些不一样了。
t_en: But as time passed, I started to notice something increasingly off about the Dreamflux Reef.

t_ch: 哼，睡蕉小猴？
t_en: Hmm. Slumbernana Monkey?

t_ch: 您果然也注意到了啊，附近的忆质在它开始盛行后发生了变化。
t_en: As I expected, it's come to your attention too. The memoria nearby has been mutating ever since Slumbernana Monkey gained popularity.

t_ch: 不知为何，那种杂音虽然没有实质性的影响，但每当我使用「同谐」的力量进行调律时，却会感到无比疲惫。
t_en: Even though the noise doesn't cause any tangible impact, it leaves me feeling awfully drained every time I use the power of Harmony for tuning. I can't explain it.

t_ch: 除此之外，我也拜访了名为「睡蕉社」的社团。
t_en: Other than that, I also paid a visit to the Slumbernana Association.

t_ch: 哦，那地方我也去过了，他们让你加入了？
t_en: Oh, I swung by that place too. They let you join up?

t_ch: 很遗憾，完全没有。任何人想要进入睡蕉社，都必须通过繁复的入社流程。
t_en: They didn't, unfortunately. Anyone who wishes to become part of the Slumbernana Association must undergo onerous entrance procedures before they can become one of them.

t_ch: 况且就算能混入其中，我的身份也太过…招摇。所以我还是把精力放在了杂音这件事上。
t_en: Besides, even if I did succeed in infiltrating them, I... would stand out too much. It makes more sense for me to focus on studying the noise instead.

t_ch: 连你也没通过啊…但我必须得进去，有什么办法吗？
t_en: So you didn't pass the test either, huh. Well, don't change the fact that I still gotta get in one way or another. Got any bright ideas?

t_ch: 提供些打听的方法倒是很简单，但您怎么突然……
t_en: I can offer a few ideas on places you can make inquiries at, but why the sudden...?

t_ch: 匹诺康尼发生什么了吗？
t_en: Is something going on in Penacony?

t_ch: 这话可就长了，等我确认完再说吧。反正这入社考试我非得通过不可。
t_en: Long story. I'll fill you in once I have more concrete details. But first, I have to pass that entrance test by hook or by crook.

t_ch: 打听啊，倒也不坏。退一万步说，我就不能喜欢睡蕉小猴了吗？铁汉柔情，现在就流行这套。
t_en: Hmm, making inquiries, you say? Not a bad idea. And heck, why couldn't I be a fan of Slumbernana Monkey? Tough guys exploring their soft side are a thing these days.

t_ch: 保底，我还有个更利索的法子。<color=#dbc291ff>之前抢地盘的那些小可爱，找他们借张会员证用用</color>，也难不到哪儿去。
t_en: If all else fails, I got an easier solution to fall back on: <color=#dbc291ff>I can just "borrow" a membership card from those lil' fudgeheads scrappin' over turf earlier</color>. Easy-peasy.

t_ch: 很奇怪。尽管存在联系，但这里…反而是没有任何杂音的地方。
t_en: Strange. They're linked, but this place... I don't detect any noise here.

t_ch: 答案很简单，开火的是枪，但要人命的是子弹。
t_en: The answer's simple: The gun may fire, but it's the bullet that does the killin'.

t_ch: 所以…波提欧先生，我听过巡海游侠的事迹，也知道那些被他们追猎的存在。
t_en: So... Mr. Boothill, I'm familiar with the Galaxy Rangers and their exploits, as well as with the entities they pursue.

t_ch: 能让您止步于此，流梦礁究竟发生了什么？
t_en: For you to stop here... something must be happening in Dreamflux Reef.

t_ch: 用不着那么客气，叫我哥们就得了。
t_en: Hey, don't be a stranger. You can just call me "pardner," yeah?

t_ch: 猴子…猴子…全他宝贝的是猴子。
t_en: Monkeys... Monkeys... And more monkeys. They're all muddle-fudgin' monkeys!

t_ch: 宝贝「御猿•邪忍」…这景象我见过太多次了，但愿别真是乱破猜的那样。
t_en: Evil Ninja Osaru, that doggoned muddle-fudger... This is way too familiar a sight for comfort. Things'd better not turn out the way Rappa feared they would.

t_ch: 嗯？还有什么事吗？
t_en: Huh? Do you need something else?

t_ch: 入社考核该找谁
t_en: Who do I look for to take the entrance test?

t_ch: 拔枪硬闯
t_en: Draw your gun and force your way in.

t_ch: （不是每个人都值得一颗子弹，他们还没到那份上。）
t_en: (Not everyone deserves a bullet in them. They haven't gone that far yet.)

t_ch: 没什么事儿
t_en: No.

t_ch: 我记得你，临时抱佛脚可没用啊。
t_en: Oh, I remember you. Last-minute cramming isn't going to help, you know.

t_ch: 放一百个心吧，现在我是小猴专家，跟使枪一样利索，问你的就行了。
t_en: Don't worry, I'm a monkey expert now, about as much as I'm a master marksman. Ask away.

t_ch: 好…唉，你真是把睡蕉社想得太简单了啊。那……
t_en: If you say so... You're taking the Slumbernana Association way too lightly, if you ask me, but here goes:

t_ch: 请问：睡蕉社的成员都有哪些级别？
t_en: What tiers make up the Slumbernana Association's membership hierarchy?

t_ch: 现代，能人，猿，史前
t_en: Human, Denisovan, Ape, Prehistoric.

t_ch: 算了算了，你这明明就是一无所知啊，以后再来吧。
t_en: Forget it. You clearly know nothing about the topic. Come back again later.

t_ch: 现代，能人，小猴
t_en: Human, Denisovan, Monkey.

t_ch: 唉，临时抱佛脚可没用啊。
t_en: Last-minute cramming isn't going to help, you know.

t_ch: 现代，能人，猿
t_en: Human, Denisovan, Ape.

t_ch: 莫奈拉介绍我来的
t_en: Monella referred me.

t_ch: 哦？你就是前辈说的那位…怎么看上去不太一样啊，算了，那倒是可以酌情降低难度。
t_en: Oh? Then you must be the one that she was talking about... But why do you look kind of different? Ah, never mind. I suppose I can make things easier for you, then.

t_ch: 那…最可能是睡蕉小猴名言的是哪一句？
t_en: Which of the following is most likely to be a famous quote by Slumbernana Monkey?

t_ch: 永生是在死亡前的那一刻被爱。
t_en: Eternal life is about being loved in the moment right before death.

t_ch: 不对不对，你这是在瞎蒙吧？这句是我从别的地方偷来的。
t_en: That's totally off the mark. You're just trying your luck, aren't you? I lifted this quote from someplace else.

t_ch: 星星徒有虚名，但它们放光。
t_en: Glorified the stars may be, yet it is them that light up the dark.

t_ch: 你对睡蕉小猴果然有很深的误解。
t_en: You seem to have quite the misconception about Slumbernana Monkey.

t_ch: 放弃所有一切，眼前风光更好。
t_en: Life grows beautiful for those who forfeit it all.

t_ch: 莫奈拉介绍我来的
t_en: Monella referred me.

t_ch: 呃，我看着像那么不负责任的样子吗？一次就可以了。
t_en: Uh, do I look like I have such poor work ethics? I heard you the first time.

t_ch: 没错！那再来最后一题——
t_en: Bingo! On to the last question now:

t_ch: 虽然睡蕉社从不禁止对于小猴的二次创作，但哪种类型是完全不应该尝试的？
t_en: Although the Slumbernana Association has never banned any derivative works inspired by Slumbernana, what kind of derivative works should you refrain from creating?

t_ch: 违背律法的
t_en: Illegal stuff.

t_ch: 这不对吧……
t_en: I don't think so...

t_ch: 阴森恐怖的
t_en: Creepy or scary stuff.

t_ch: 过于夸张的
t_en: Overdramatic stuff.

t_ch: 对睡蕉小猴来说，没有哪种形容会显得夸张，先生，你怎么回事？
t_en: Are you serious? No narrative is too dramatic for Slumbernana Monkey, sir.

t_ch: 没错没错，这是最可恨的抹黑手段。
t_en: Exactly! That's the most despicable form of slander.

t_ch: 通过了，先生，你真是令人刮目相看！请进请进。
t_en: Congratulations, you've passed! That was impressive! This way, sir.

t_ch: 嗯？还有什么事吗？
t_en: Huh? Do you need something else?

t_ch: 社员证带来了
t_en: I brought my membership card.

t_ch: 哦？倒是货真价实的社员证。能人<unbreak>124</unbreak>……
t_en: Oh? And a genuine article, no less. Let's see, Denisovan <unbreak>124</unbreak>...

t_ch: 凯瑟琳•玛莎？这是您吗？
t_en: Mister... Uh, Catherine Marta?

t_ch: 是啊，怎么，你有意见？
t_en: That's me, pardner. Got a problem?

t_ch: 没有没有，传说中您的行事作风和名字格格不入，相当硬派——看来确有其事，请进请进。
t_en: No, no, not at all. I've heard that your name and assertive demeanor are quite the juxtaposition, and it looks like there's truth to these stories indeed. Now, if you'll follow me.

t_ch: 没什么事儿
t_en: No.

t_ch: 欢迎欢迎，要来一只睡蕉小猴的玩偶吗？免费赠送，我亲手缝的！
t_en: Welcome, welcome! A Slumbernana Monkey toy for you, mister? I made it myself. Don't worry, I'm not taking any money for it!

t_ch: 你觉得我像是会把这猴子摆在床头的人吗？
t_en: Do I look like someone who'd place that monkey beside my pillow?

t_ch: 这可说不好，你看上去多可爱呀。
t_en: Well, you never know! You look really cute, after all!

t_ch: 我…你…啊？
t_en: I... You... What!?

t_ch: 等等等等，我是没睡醒吗？您…您是知更鸟小姐吗？
t_en: W—Wait a minute! Am I dreaming? A—Are you Miss Robin?

t_ch: 你好啊。
t_en: Hello.

t_ch: 天哪，我刚才还在听您的新专辑呢！您怎么到流梦礁来啦？
t_en: Oh, my! I was just listening to your newest album! What brings you to Dreamflux Reef?

t_ch: 其实我最近一直在，只是我们没遇见。但别担心，这样的日子还会持续一段时间呢。
t_en: I've been frequenting this place lately actually. We just hadn't crossed paths until now. Don't worry, you'll be seeing me around these parts for a while more.

t_ch: ——毕竟睡蕉社的入社考验看起来没那么容易呀。
t_en: ...After all, the Slumbernana Association's entrance test doesn't seem that easy.

t_ch: 睡、睡蕉社？您要加入睡蕉社？
t_en: Th—The Slumbernana Association? Are you planning on becoming a member?

t_ch: 我肯定是没睡醒吧？这种双厨狂喜的好事儿，还能让我碰上？
t_en: I must be dreaming! Two of my favorite things together? I must be the luckiest fan alive!

t_ch: 如果是知更鸟小姐，怎么也该破格招新呀！
t_en: If it's you, Miss Robin, then of course we must make an exception and let you in!

t_ch: 这倒不用，我只是个普通人，就和所有喜欢睡蕉小猴的人一样。
t_en: You don't have to give me special treatment. I'm just a normal person like every other Slumbernana Monkey fan out there.

t_ch: 但要好事成双，让让步也没什么。带上这个再去吧，他们看到就明白了——放心，不会破坏规矩，只是提醒他们别刻意刁难。
t_en: But you know what they say: Good things come in pairs! There's no harm in making a concession sometimes. Here, bring this with you the next time you head over. They'll know what to do once they see it. And don't worry, we're still playing by the book. This is just to keep them from making things difficult for you.

t_ch: 其实我完全不懂该怎么谱曲。这首是我从其他地方借来的。
t_en: To be honest, I'm absolutely clueless when it comes to songwriting. This song was taken from somewhere else.

t_ch: 但我第一次听见它的旋律，就觉得很适合用来讲述睡蕉小猴的故事，于是便重新填了词。
t_en: But the first time I heard it, I knew immediately that it was the perfect song for telling a Slumbernana Monkey's story, so I wrote new lyrics for it.

t_ch: 《走在睡蕉上的旅行》，献丑了蕉！
t_en: This is "The Slumbernana Traveler." I hope you find it ap-"peeling"!

t_ch: 我曾走过许多世界，是睡蕉小猴陪在身旁~
t_en: I've wandered far, I've wandered wide, with Slumbernana Monkey~

t_ch: 它的声音那么清晰，告诉我什么不能忘~
t_en: Its voice so clear, its voice so bright, tells me to remember~

t_ch: 它说累了就休息吧，停下来也没关系~
t_en: When you're tired, take a rest, take a break, it's for the best~

t_ch: <size=28>「放弃所有一切，眼前风光才能更好」~</size>
t_en: <size=28>"Life grows beautiful for those who will forfeit it all."</size>

t_ch: 还唱上了？专业人士说两句？
t_en: They're even singing about it now? So, what's your expert opinion on this?

t_ch: 我很喜欢，歌曲最重要的意义就是任何人都能唱，怎样的苦难都无法夺走人们的歌声。
t_en: I love it. A song finds meaning in its existence only when it can be sung by anyone and everyone. No matter how hard or tough an ordeal is, it can never take song away from the people.

t_ch: 好了好了，我们很快就会布置好的。
t_en: Soon, soon. Everything will be set up real soon.

t_ch: 明天过后，欢迎大家再来「睡蕉大道」玩。
t_en: We welcome you to visit Slumbernana Avenue again for more fun after tomorrow!

t_ch: 哎哎…不是，瞧你这话说的。你来了我家，然后和我说「跟自己家一样就行」？
t_en: No, are you mistaken or something? Coming to my place and then telling me to "make myself at home"?

t_ch: 谁答应你们把这里据为己有了？
t_en: Who made you owner of this place!?

t_ch: 这是……
t_en: Is this...

t_ch: 他宝贝的，贼心不死啊！可算找到你们几个小可爱了。
t_en: Well, well. Finally found these lil' fudgeheads! And would you look at that? They just don't know when to quit.

t_ch: 啊，是那些四处宣传睡蕉小猴的社员吗？那不就是说……
t_en: Ah, are they the association members going around promoting Slumbernana Monkey? Then that means...

t_ch: 想不到咱们的脾气倒是挺合拍的，我懂你意思。
t_en: Yep. Hey, we make pretty good pardners, huh.

t_ch: 嗯，只要旁敲侧击，然后……
t_en: Indeed. We need only sound them out and—

t_ch: 嘿！你们几个小可爱，看这儿！
t_en: Hey! Look over here, muddle-fudgers!

t_ch: 还真是个脑子不好使的——我在找茬，懂了吗？
t_en: A little slow on the uptake, ain'tcha? I'm picking a fight here, pardner.

t_ch: 漂亮，旁敲侧击！
t_en: Loud, huh? How's that for soundin' em out?

t_ch: 抱歉，波提欧先生，我以后还是少用些修辞吧。
t_en: My apologies, I'll cut back on figures of speech in the future, Mr. Boothill.

t_ch: 不是…啊…你到底什么人……
t_en: No, wait... Argh... Who the heck are you?

t_ch: 你得学着尊重别人的地盘，懂吗？
t_en: You need to respect other folks' turf, ya hear?

t_ch: 听好了，现在我会把皮带解下来挂在旁边，然后我问一句，你说一句。
t_en: Listen up. I'm gonna take off my belt and hang it up here. After that, I'll ask a few questions, and you're gonna answer every one of 'em.

t_ch: …皮带？
t_en: ...Your belt?

t_ch: 哦，你别把我当什么善茬，小可爱。
t_en: Don't mistake me for a fudgin' saint now, you son of a nice lady.

t_ch: 我也不是没拷问过其他人，有了这根皮带，受不了的时候，你们可以自己爬过去上吊。
t_en: I ain't no greenhorn interrogator, pardner. This belt is put here so that ash-voles like you can crawl over and hang yourselves when you can't take no more.

t_ch: 您说……
t_en: ...What can I do for you?

t_ch: 现在知道好好说话了？睡蕉社的？证件拿出来看看。
t_en: Hah, I see you finally learned some manners. Now show me your Slumbernana Association ID.

t_ch: 没有进行任何反抗，男人开始在身上摸索起来。
t_en: Without any resistance, the man began to search through his belongings.

t_ch: 啊，在这里…您拿去。
t_en: Here... Take it.

t_ch: 难道说，是助蕉们让您来找我的？
t_en: Don't tell me... Was it the Assistanana that sent you after me?

t_ch: 你尽管猜吧，但别想听见半个字儿，滚。
t_en: Rack your brain all you want, but you ain't gettin' a word outta me. Now scram.

t_ch: 走了，姐们，去看看搞事儿的到底几颗牙。
t_en: Let's go, pardner. Time to see what those troublemakers are capable of.

t_ch: …波提欧先生，继续结伴恐怕不是最好的选择。
t_en: ...I'm afraid it won't be wise for us to continue our investigations together, Mr. Boothill.

t_ch: 怎么说？
t_en: What do you mean?

t_ch: 如果接下来波提欧先生打算低调行事，那我就会变成拖累。
t_en: If you're hoping to keep a low profile, my presence will only be a burden, Mr. Boothill.

t_ch: 而且，如果您打算使用一些特别的手段，我还是不在现场为好。
t_en: Moreover, if you intend to employ... certain means of doing things, it'll be for the better if I'm not around.

t_ch: 哼，到底是家族的话事人，懂的远比看上去多啊。
t_en: Hmph, as expected of one in a seat of power in The Family. You're a lot sharper than you let on.

t_ch: 不知道接下来会发生什么，稳妥起见，得有人留在外面。
t_en: It's hard to tell what all of this is building towards. It'll be prudent for one of us to stay on the outside.

t_ch: 那外头就交给你了。这一路…多谢了。
t_en: Gotcha, I'll leave things out here to you, then. Oh, thanks for all the help so far.

t_ch: 哪里，我才更应该道谢吧。感谢波提欧先生愿意伸出援手。巡海游侠的气度…果真名不虚传。
t_en: You're too kind. I should be thanking you instead. You have my gratitude for offering your assistance, Mr. Boothill. You live up to the name of a Galaxy Ranger indeed.

t_ch: 哈，毕竟不是自己的地盘，还是把话说明白好些——
t_en: Hah, this ain't my turf, so let me just make some things clear.

t_ch: 善恶的事，我不怎么关心。接下来，在那小可爱社团里将要发生的，也和我在其他地方做的事差不多。
t_en: I don't give a rat's behind about people doin' good or evil. Whatever's about to unfold in that little club full of shirt-for-brains is no different from the usual stuff I do elsewhere.

t_ch: 场面未必好看，但结果一定公道。我只在乎公道。
t_en: Things ain't gonna be pretty, but justice will be served, and that's all I care about.

t_ch: 我明白了，那…祝一切顺利，我也会试着寻找杂音的源头，之后再见了，波提欧先生。
t_en: I see... Then I wish you all the best. As for me, I will try to trace the noise to its source. We'll see each other again later, Mr. Boothill.

t_ch: 他香蕉的，半点儿奇怪的地方都没有，藏得够深啊。
t_en: Fudge me. There ain't nothin' strange about this place at all. These ash-voles are good.

t_ch: …走得倒挺快。
t_en: ...That was quick.

t_ch: 他香蕉的，什么玩意儿，欢迎仪式这就安排上了？
t_en: Well, butter my banana and call me a biscuit, we kickin' off the member initiation rite so soon?

t_ch: 好啊，那就直接来，玩忍者潜入的有一个就够了。
t_en: Then bring it on, baby! One ninja's more than enough for this game of infiltration.

t_ch: 他香蕉的，等会儿…这是我自己？
t_en: Wait a banana... is that... me?

t_ch: 哎哎哎先等等——
t_en: Eek! W—Wait!

t_ch: 呃，逃节课的后果这么严重吗？
t_en: Ugh, are the consequences of skipping one class that serious?

t_ch: 无论怎么捣鼓，球车都没有启动的迹象。
t_en: No matter how hard you try, the Spheroid gives no indication of being activated.

t_ch: 一定是出现了什么故障——牛仔可从不承认自己在某些科技面前略显笨拙。
t_en: Something must have malfunctioned — Cowboys would never admit to their technological ineptitude.

t_ch: 不用担心，已经完全没事了。
t_en: Don't worry. Everything's fine now.

t_ch: 哦，那还真他宝贝的棒，但我都说过几遍了……
t_en: Oh wow, that's muddle-fudgin' fantastic news! As if I haven't already told you that the last few times...

t_ch: 用不着给我看脑子！还问起诊来了？
t_en: There's no need for my head to be checked... let alone a consultation!

t_ch: 毕竟还得给你找个理由背锅呢…精神不正常也算是一种？
t_en: I mean, we needed an excuse for your behavior anyway... Surely insanity counts?

t_ch: 什么玩意？
t_en: What are you even saying!?

t_ch: 倒也不用这么消极。现在看来，流梦礁就是敌人真正的目标。
t_en: All hope is not lost yet. It looks like Dreamflux Reef is the enemy's real target.

t_ch: 两位在睡蕉社的见闻就是证明。也多亏你们及时出手，阴谋才得以被暂时遏制……
t_en: Everything that the both of you saw and heard at the Slumbernana Association is evidence enough. Thankfully, you managed to intervene in time and put a stop to their schemes for now...

t_ch: 但即便如此，现状依旧严峻。
t_en: Even so, the current situation is still rather grim.

t_ch: 抱歉，我只带回来一个坏消息……
t_en: Apologies, but I only bring bad news...

t_ch: 和一个好消息？
t_en: And good news too?

t_ch: 可惜，没有后半句。
t_en: I wish... But no, nothing of the sort.

t_ch: 好吧，至少没有「一个更坏的消息」……
t_en: Oh well, at least you didn't say "worse news"...

t_ch: 「转变」仍在继续，流梦礁的猴子越来越多了，毫无疑问都是这里的居民。
t_en: The "conversion" is still in progress. The number of monkeys in Dreamflux Reef is still increasing, and I'm certain they used to be residents of the place.

t_ch: 和我感知到的一样，笼罩流梦礁的弯曲杂音并未消失。
t_en: I sense the same. There is still a discordant static on Dreamflux Reef.

t_ch: 嗯。说是蛊惑也好，诱导也罢，那种杂音的确撬开了人们心中的空隙。
t_en: Call it bewitchment or persuasion, the fact remains that such dissonance has indeed wrenched open the emptiness in people's hearts.

t_ch: 我拜托了可信的猎犬，只要见到助蕉就立刻消灭，看来还是于事无补……
t_en: I went to a few trustworthy Bloodhounds for help, asking them to eliminate any Assistananas that they come across. Looks like that's not helping the current situation...

t_ch: 米凯先生，这里当属你最了解流梦礁，有什么提议吗？
t_en: Mr. Micah, you know Dreamflux Reef the best among us. Do you have any suggestions?

t_ch: 时间紧迫，我就免去繁文缛节了。
t_en: We're in a race against time, so I'll dispense with the formalities.

t_ch: 流梦礁仍有助蕉在暗中行动，四处寻找尚未变成猴子的居民，把他们推向深渊。如果二位肯搭把手，就能为我们争取更多时间。
t_en: In Dreamflux Reef, there are still Assistananas working in secret, searching all over the place for residents who haven't been turned into monkeys and pushing them into that abyss. If the both of you are willing to aid us, it'll buy us more time.

t_ch: 而知更鸟小姐…或许您才是解决这一危机的关键。
t_en: As for Miss Robin... you may just be the key to resolving this crisis.

t_ch: 但向您求助也就意味着，最坏的情况下，流梦礁和家族的界线将不复存在。这里之后会变得如何…我需要一个承诺。
t_en: But if we were to ask for your help, we have to be prepared for the worst-case scenario where the boundary between Dreamflux Reef and The Family will no longer exist. I... will need your promise regarding the future of this place.

t_ch: 我明白…那就拜托波提欧先生和三月七小姐先行动起来。
t_en: I understand... In that case, please go ahead with your plans first, Mr. Boothill and Miss March 7th.

t_ch: 在你们结束前，这边也会做出决定。
t_en: Before you wrap up your business, we will have made our decision too.

t_ch: 正因违背了流梦礁的原则，现在我才会这么犹豫。
t_en: I'm only hesitating so much because this is going against Dreamflux Reef's principles.

t_ch: 蒙塔娜！等等等等…小心啊！
t_en: Montana! W—Wait up... Watch out!

t_ch: 三月同学……
t_en: March...?

t_ch: 太好了，原来你还没开始转变呢！
t_en: Good thing you haven't been converted!

t_ch: 你看，他们根本就不是什么——
t_en: See? Those things are not—

t_ch: 三月七话音未落，蒙塔娜自顾自跑开了……
t_en: Montana runs off on her own before March 7th even finishes speaking...

t_ch: 哎，我还没说完呢！
t_en: Hey, I'm not done yet!

t_ch: 不能放着她不管！我等下再去找你会合，不是临阵脱逃哈。
t_en: We can't leave her alone! I'll meet up with you later. This isn't me running away from a fight, okay?

t_ch: 你不说我都没觉得，无名客姐们。
t_en: Pfft. I wouldn't have thought that until you said it.

t_ch: 能见到猴子以外的演员，实在令人愉快。
t_en: Being able to see an actor who isn't a monkey... fills me with such joy.

t_ch: 否则，这一幕就会显得太过单调。
t_en: This scene would be overly monotonous otherwise.

t_ch: 虽然我觉得这样登场也有些刻意。但毕竟时间有限……
t_en: Though I too find this way of making my entrance rather excessively deliberate, we're not blessed with the luxury of time...

t_ch: 作为开场，刻意一些也无妨。
t_en: What's a little blatant engineering in the opening sequence, won't you agree?

t_ch: 你是谁，知更鸟的人？不对…你是个忆者？
t_en: Who are you? Robin's people? No... You're a Memokeeper.

t_ch: 很敏锐的直觉，但那重身份不重要。我出现在这里，只是出于对电影美学的苛求。
t_en: Keen intuition, but that layer of my identity isn't important. I am only here because of my fastidiousness toward the theatrical arts.

t_ch: 他宝贝的，在说什么？
t_en: What in forkin' hell are you trying to say?

t_ch: 本来还打算提醒你离远点，但故弄玄虚的家伙变猴子就变了吧，还能清净些。
t_en: I was planning to tell you to stay away from this place, but you're being so annoyingly pretentious that you're better off turning into a monkey. At least you'd be less noisy then.

t_ch: 对你而言，我的出现是有些突然，也称得上缺乏铺垫。换作平时，我断然无法接受这种不够精致的编排。
t_en: You may think that I popped up out nowhere — and yes, you can attribute that to a lack of foreshadowing. I wouldn't have approved such a sloppy sequence in usual cases.

t_ch: 但为了这部影片，我愿意放下一些坚持，为两位游侠提供一些小小的关联。
t_en: Yet, for the sake of this film, I am willing to forgo some of my standards to offer some tiny clues to you and the other Ranger.

t_ch: 哦，原来是乱破派你来的？难怪说话和她一样弯绕。
t_en: Oh, Rappa sent you? No wonder you're talking in that same convoluted manner.

t_ch: 眼下当然存在一种拯救流梦礁的方式。只要家族介入，解决这里的异变绝非难事。但这未必是众人能接受的走向。
t_en: At present, there is an obvious way to save Dreamflux Reef. As long as The Family steps into the picture, resolving the mutation that's occurred here would be a piece of cake. However, this is not a solution that the masses may be willing to accept.

t_ch: 是你太看不起这地儿了。
t_en: You think too little of the people here.

t_ch: 他们抛弃外面的美梦，只是为了做回自己。你觉得这么群人，会因为区区危机就向家族低头？
t_en: They gave up on those sweet dreams out there just so they can be true to themselves. You reckon such people would grovel at the feet of The Family over a mere crisis?

t_ch: 米凯先生也是这么想的。可一腔热血救不了流梦礁，此时此刻，我也不想执导一出悲剧。
t_en: Yes, Mr. Micah thinks the same. But that perseverance of theirs isn't going to save Dreamflux Reef. I don't wish for this film to develop into a tragedy either.

t_ch: 若要渡过难关，又不想仰赖家族援助。流梦礁的人们就必须唱出属于自己的「同谐」之歌，这才是我的来意。
t_en: If the residents of Dreamflux Reef hope to tide over the crisis without The Family's help, they will have to sing their very own song of Harmony. This is why I'm here.

t_ch: 我为各位准备了一份礼物，那是下一幕的「大纲」。等你揭开它时，自然就会明白。
t_en: I have prepared a big gift for all of you — The "outline" for the next act. You'll see once you open it.

t_ch: 我凭什么信你？
t_en: And why should I believe you?

t_ch: 在这场戏中，我既是导演，也是演员。对于自己杀青前的最后一幕……
t_en: I am the director of this film as much as I am an actor in it. When it comes to the last scene that I will appear in...

t_ch: 我没有理由，不追求极致。
t_en: There's no reason for me not to seek perfection.

t_ch: 事实上，我对自己的入戏方式仍不满意。但我相信，你的演绎会将这一幕推向更高的位置。
t_en: Truth be told, I do not find the way I entered the act to be satisfactory, but I believe your acting will make this scene better.

t_ch: 哈，我就知道，指望那小可爱不装神弄鬼没戏。
t_en: Ha, I knew it. There's no way the lil' fudgehead will come right out and say what he actually means.

t_ch: 来——看看你搞什么鬼。
t_en: Let's see just what you're up to then.

t_ch: 在掀开一角之前，男人心里有很多种猜测——
t_en: Before opening it, he has many speculations—

t_ch: 而他也相信，无论自己看到什么，都能维系惯常的不屑，狠狠嘲笑对方的故弄玄虚。
t_en: He also believes that no matter what he sees, he can maintain his usual contempt and mock the other for his trickery.

t_ch: 但就在那么做了之后……
t_en: But right after doing that...

t_ch: 这是……
t_en: This is...

t_ch: 哈…哈哈哈……
t_en: Ha... Hahahahahahahahahaha...

t_ch: 倒是没错！那小可爱有两下子。想让流梦礁的人唱起「同谐」之歌，确实没有比这更好的法子！
t_en: Darn right, he is! That muddle-fudger does know what he's talking about. Nothing else can beat this if the people of Dreamflux Reef have to come together to sing their song of Harmony!

t_ch: 该回来见见大明星了！他宝贝的，这地方确实没有逊到要家族帮忙！
t_en: Time to go back to that singing queen! Forkin' hell, this place totally ain't shabby enough to ask The Family for help!

t_ch: 我明白了，米凯先生，我会尽力而为。
t_en: I understand. I'll try my best, Mr. Micah.

t_ch: 先等等——商量出什么了？
t_en: Alright there, hold your horses! What do y'all have so far?

t_ch: 啊，波提欧先生…外面情况怎么样？
t_en: Oh, it's you Mr. Boothill... How are things outside?

t_ch: 就那鬼样，眼熟，但不怎么令人怀念。
t_en: Same ol' sorry sight. Not that I miss it.

t_ch: 别无他法了么……
t_en: Have we really come to this...?

t_ch: 怎么了哥们，再过一会儿，我就得学着和家族打招呼了？
t_en: What's do you mean, pardner? Am I going to have to start learning how to greet The Family now?

t_ch: 恰恰相反。在流梦礁，那是绝不可能发生的。
t_en: On the contrary, that's something that will never happen in Dreamflux Reef.

t_ch: 说到底，我只是一位守夜人，并非流梦礁的领袖，也不该干涉居民们选择的权利。
t_en: At the end of the day, I'm just Dreamflux Reef's Night Watch... not its leader. I'm loath to interfere with people's right to choose.

t_ch: 选择？你难道觉得他们变成猴子是心甘情愿？
t_en: Choose? Don't tell me you believe they chose to become monkeys?

t_ch: 这正是我要说的，对于这些追求自我的人们，我不相信他们愿意通过抹除自我来获得幸福。
t_en: That's exactly my point. These are people who seek their true selves. I don't believe they would seek happiness by erasing their individuality.

t_ch: 我不会制止他们奔向毁灭，但前提是…他们能够清醒地作出决断。
t_en: But I won't stop them from heading towards destruction... as long as they made the decision with a clear head.

t_ch: 哈，就是这样！
t_en: Hah, that's my boy!

t_ch: 如果有人想变成猴子，我不否认那是一种志向。
t_en: If there are people who aspire to become monkeys, I won't deny them of that dream.

t_ch: 但至少，知更鸟小姐能将选择的权利重新摆到他们面前。
t_en: But I hope Miss Robin would at least give them that right to choose once again.

t_ch: 的确有一种办法，能让流梦礁在不被察觉的情况下，化解眼前的危机。
t_en: There is indeed a way to resolve the impending crisis without drawing The Family's eyes to Dreamflux Reef.

t_ch: 既然「同谐」的调律能够消除杂音。如果居民们愿意在我的引领下合唱谐乐，也许就能驱散回荡在流梦礁的恶曲。
t_en: We know the tuning of Harmony can erase the static noise. If the people of Dreamflux Reef are willing to follow my lead in singing a Charmonic tune together, we may be able to erase the heinous noises reverberating around Dreamflux Reef.

t_ch: 但考虑到部分居民对家族的成见，这未必是件容易的事。
t_en: But knowing how a number of residents here view The Family... It won't be easy for the plan to work.

t_ch: 更重要的是，如果流梦礁也只剩下家族的谐乐一种声音…那即便我们渡过这场难关，匹诺康尼最后一处自由之地也名存实亡了。
t_en: More importantly, if The Family's tunes become the only song left on Dreamflux Reef... We would've survived the crisis, but Penacony's only land of freedom would also cease to exist.

t_ch: 既然如此，让所有声音一起响不就完了！听着，我现在有个绝妙的主意。
t_en: Bah, just have every sound and voice come together in a single song! Listen. I have a fudgin' brilliant idea!

t_ch: 跟我来，大明星，接下来就看你够不够离经叛道了。
t_en: Come with me, singing queen! Whether it works or not depends on how much of a deviant you are.

t_ch: 瞧好了，大明星，现在，能在流梦礁举办大合唱的法子就这么一种……
t_en: You ready for it? Now this is the only way to get everyone in Dreamflux Reef to sing together...
This...

t_ch: 不用我多说了吧？
t_en: Need I say any more?

t_ch: 可别说你高高在上惯了，用不来眼前这玩意儿。
t_en: Don't tell me that you've been so used to your classy posh instruments that this thing is beneath you.

t_ch: 这倒不会…凡是和音律相关的，我多少都会。
t_en: No, that's not it... I know a thing or two regarding everything related to tunes.

t_ch: 但…这还真是胡闹啊。
t_en: But... this really is absurd.

t_ch: 但或许胡闹的危机，就应该用胡闹的方式来解决吧。
t_en: Perhaps an absurd crisis calls for an equally absurd solution.

t_ch: 这就对了，需要的人我保准给你带齐。
t_en: That's the way. Leave the rest to me. I'll make sure to get everyone we need.

t_ch: 有人跳支舞就拯救了世界，有人哭一场就灭了对手，现在轮到我们了！
t_en: Some people saved their world by giving a dance, and some people defeated their enemies by crying... It's finally our turn now!

t_ch: 危机存亡的时候，我们办一场他宝贝的派对！
t_en: Got a crisis? Throw a party, yee-haw!

t_ch: 呦——哥几个，怎么颤颤巍巍的？今儿没喝够？
t_en: Howdy, pardner! What's wrong, pals? Ooh, that's one distressed look you have there! Haven't been swiggin' enough, eh?

t_ch: 那边的牛仔，有空说风凉话，不如过来搭把手。
t_en: Shut up, cowboy. Enough snide remarks. Come over and help us out.

t_ch: 巧了，我就是来搭把手的。给你们指个地儿，去那儿待着吧。
t_en: Oh? That's exactly what I'm here for! Here, head over to this place and just wait for it.

t_ch: 我早说过，人犯不着太聪明，有时候去舞池里跳一曲，事儿同样能解决。
t_en: Hah, I called it, didn't I? Who needs all that brain when swingin' around on the dance floor solves things just the same?

t_ch: 牛仔？是那时候的…难道说知更鸟小姐……
t_en: A cowboy? Oh, right... the same guy as the other time! Could Miss Robin be...?

t_ch: 大家，跟我来吧，他…或许言之有理呢！
t_en: Come with me, everyone! I think he might just be making some sense!

t_ch: 莫奈拉，你怎么又……
t_en: Monella, why are you...

t_ch: 算了，疯了这么多，也不差你一个了，那就过去看看吧。
t_en: Never mind. What's one more loony to the count? Let's go see what's going on then.

t_ch: 竟然看到了知更鸟小姐，我就知道……
t_en: It's Miss Robin, in the flesh! I knew it...

t_ch: 你知道什么了？这会儿就别追星了吧，我是看不出来这哪像个能避难的样子。
t_en: What do you know? Now's not the time to be a fan. How's this place even going to be a shelter?

t_ch: 别着急，哥们，现在还不够热闹——你就瞧好吧。
t_en: Patience, pal. Wait till the crowd starts spilling in. That's when it'll happen.

t_ch: 哥们，别愣着了，那边有场大派对，相当爱你，不去看看？
t_en: Snap out of it, cowpokes! There's a big party going on over there, and it's lit as fudge. Why don't you go check it out?

t_ch: 米凯已经和我们说过了，参加家族的谐乐？滚远点儿。
t_en: Micah already told us about it. Chiming in on The Family's harmonic tunes? You best get the hell out of my face!

t_ch: 哈，还抢起我的词儿了？那也好办。
t_en: Sheesh, isn't that one of my lines? But sure, if you prefer it this way...

t_ch: 枪已在手。
t_en: The gun is in hand.

t_ch: 我知道这事荒唐了点，但赶紧挪个地儿，要么去派对上把你们的地盘救回来，要么让派对多给你们奏个哀乐。
t_en: I know I'm being a lil' demanding here, but get your hide parts over to that party right now and save your home, or I'll make sure to dedicate an elegy for every one of you!
You...

t_ch: 没见过流氓？我不是米凯，想赌一赌我会不会开枪？
t_en: Never seen a thug before? I'm not Micah. Wanna try me and my gun?

t_ch: 这到底怎么回事…没变成猴子的人还更疯了？
t_en: What's going on...? Are fellow humans more dangerous than those monkeys now?

t_ch: 就按你说的…先把枪拿开。
t_en: Fine, we'll go to the party. Just... keep that gun of yours away.

t_ch: 呦，倒是挺安分，喜欢这吗，哥们？
t_en: Oh ho, you sure turned obedient here. So, how do you like this party, pal?

t_ch: 怎么，你还要回来监视我不成？
t_en: What? Are you here to watch over my shoulder now?

t_ch: 哈——那大明星今天要做的事情难得一见，我当然要回来看看。
t_en: Pfft. That singing queen's gonna put up a once-in-a-lifetime performance. You bet I'm not missin' it.

t_ch: 我可不想错过开场，你最好也一样！
t_en: I'll do anything to catch the opening. Make sure you don't miss it too!

t_ch: …没错，我并不是在劝说，或是高高在上地给出建议。
t_en: ...That's right. I'm not trying to persuade anyone, or offering a suggestion while standing on high ground.

t_ch: 我只是把一个你们没能想到的选择摆出来，至于要不要拯救自己，那也由你们。
t_en: I'm simply offering an option that has never crossed your minds. It's your choice if you want to give up on saving yourselves.

t_ch: 挺顺利啊，算了，就不插一脚了。
t_en: He's getting the hang of it. Guess I'll just stay out of it then.

t_ch: 呦，瞧瞧这是谁来了。
t_en: My, my, my, look who's here!

t_ch: 啊…我找你好半天了。
t_en: Ahh... I've been looking for you all day!

t_ch: 你猜猜我信没信？
t_en: Hmm, should I believe that or not...

t_ch: 那算了嘛——之前打的助蕉算我一半就行。
t_en: Oh, alright then! I'll just take half the credit for those Assistananas we took out earlier.

t_ch: 那一半也就「一半」。
t_en: Yeah, that's also just "half" of the whole lot.

t_ch: 噫——我就说怎么一点变化都没有，走走走，咱们抓紧时间。
t_en: Huh? So that's why nothing's going back to normal! C'mon, we need to hurry.

t_ch: 犯不着，现在有新法子了。你这边呢，事儿办完了？
t_en: No need for that. We've got a new plan now. How did it go with her? Convinced?

t_ch: 我…也会尽力帮忙的。
t_en: I—I'll help out wherever possible.

t_ch: 嚯，怎么搞定的？你把她的助蕉解决了？
t_en: Jeepers! How'd you get through to her? Mashed her Assistanana to pulp?

t_ch: 三月同学都和我说了，其实我根本没受到助蕉影响啦…是有一些别的原因。
t_en: March explained everything to me. I wasn't really influenced by the Assistananas... It was something else.

t_ch: 反正不是你的错。那帮家伙真是坏极了，说什么一无所有更好，实际上要是不把人变成那样，他们才没本事控制每一个人呢。
t_en: Anyway, it's not your fault. Those bananas are incorrigible! Preaching about how having nothing is best... More like they wouldn't be able to control a single human if none of us thought that way.

t_ch: 只要能被一枪爱死，有什么哲学都无所谓。
t_en: Say whatever they like. They're nothing but smashed fudges once I put my bullets into them.

t_ch: 没事了就跟我来，带你们去个好地方。
t_en: Everything ironed out between you two now? Follow me then.

t_ch: 喔…还真够热闹啊。
t_en: Wow... Everyone's here!

t_ch: 哈，哥们说什么来着？这年头哪还有人玩合唱？
t_en: Hah! What was it you said? Who in their right mind would sing in a choir in this era?

t_ch: 但你要说有派对，他们肯定抢着来。
t_en: Not when you tell them there's a party. That's when people come flockin'.

t_ch: 啥？派对？
t_en: What? A party?

t_ch: 波提欧先生，你回来了？
t_en: You're back, Mr. Boothill.

t_ch: 其实是米凯先生帮了许多忙。
t_en: We wouldn't have this turnout if it wasn't for Mr. Micah.

t_ch: 他们中有很多人不信任我，更不信任谐乐的力量。但…他们愿意相信米凯先生。
t_en: Most of them are unwilling to trust me, much less the power of Charmony. But... they chose to put their faith in Mr. Micah.

t_ch: 恐怕不是相信我，而是他们从没想过放弃这里。
t_en: I think it's less about believing me than them not wanting to give up on this place.

t_ch: 大伙儿都憋着股劲呢，能用家族以外的方式破除万难，对于流梦礁这还是第一次。
t_en: Everyone's got something they want to prove. It's the first time Dreamflux Reef has ever had a way to overcome difficulties on our own, without relying on The Family.

t_ch: 所以你们到底是要干什么啊？
t_en: So, what exactly are you gonna do?

t_ch: 你可能也会觉得…有些难以置信。我竟然会认同那种方法，真是疯了。
t_en: You're likely to find it... a little unbelievable. I still can't wrap my head around how I actually agreed to this. I must be crazy.
